LanguageData.ABY_AshboundFieldPack.label: ashbound field pack
LanguageData.ABY_AshboundFieldPack.description: A compact abyssal field pack built for early forge operators and breach-line haulers. Steel ribs, residue canisters and a restrained harness frame make it useful without turning the wearer into a walking shrine.
LanguageData.ABY_RiftRelayPack.label: rift relay pack
LanguageData.ABY_RiftRelayPack.description: A relay-grade abyssal pack with a compact rift conduit, stronger load frame and hotter canister feed. It pushes mobility and hauling beyond the ashbound baseline, but the wearer is unmistakably carrying a live infernal device.
LanguageData.ABY_CrownConduitPack.label: crown conduit pack
LanguageData.ABY_CrownConduitPack.description: A crown-tier conduit pack built around a compact authority core. It is part reactor, part relay and part command seal: heavy, expensive and designed for colonists trusted with the late abyssal line.
